name: voice-intercom
description: Platform-independent push-to-talk intercom receiver + controller PWA. Runs unmodified on Android (Termux), Debian, Ubuntu and Raspberry Pi OS.

scripts.icons: node tools/make-icon.js controller/icon-192.png 192 && node tools/make-icon.js controller/icon-512.png 512 && node tools/make-icon.js controller/icon-maskable-512.png 512 --maskable
